Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. Type-7 methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=jasmonate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = methyl (-)-jasmonate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:13349, ChEBI:CHEBI:15929, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:58431, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.141; Evidence={ECO:0000250|UniProtKB:Q9AR07};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methylation of jasmonate into methyljasmonate, a plant volatile that acts as an important cellular regulator mediating diverse developmental processes and defense responses. {ECO:0000250|UniProtKB:Q9AR07}.
